creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
This PR can now be closed:

The problem was that the configure script failed to detect the condition
where the DES libraries wasn't installed when attempting to determin if it
should enable the KERBEROS V4 sasl plugin.

This problem has been fixed in cyrus-sasl-1.5.15.  PR 16130 was submitted to
upgrade the Cyrus-SASL port.

Scot W. Hetzel
